name: CentyPack Batch Exceptions
query:
SELECT
  bc.batch_no AS "Batch:Link/Batch:170",
  bc.company AS "Company:Link/Company:150",
  bc.customer AS "Customer:Link/Customer:170",
  bc.farmer AS "Farmer:Link/Farmer:160",
  bc.farm_weight_kg AS "Farm Kg:Float:100",
  bc.packhouse_weight_kg AS "Packhouse Kg:Float:120",
  bc.allowable_variance_kg AS "Allowable Var Kg:Float:120",
  bc.variance_kg AS "Variance Kg:Float:100",
  bc.variance_status AS "Variance Status:Data:130",
  bc.packed_kg AS "Packed Kg:Float:100",
  bc.rejected_kg AS "Rejected Kg:Float:110",
  bc.returned_to_stock_kg AS "Returned Kg:Float:110",
  bc.available_kg AS "Available Kg:Float:110",
  ROUND((COALESCE(bc.rejected_kg,0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(bc.packhouse_weight_kg,0),0)) * 100, 2) AS "Rejected %:Percent:100",
  CASE
    WHEN ABS(COALESCE(bc.variance_kg,0)) > COALESCE(bc.allowable_variance_kg,20) THEN 'VARIANCE_BREACH'
    WHEN COALESCE(bc.available_kg,0) <= 0 THEN 'NO_AVAILABLE_BALANCE'
    WHEN (COALESCE(bc.rejected_kg,0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(bc.packhouse_weight_kg,0),0)) * 100 >= COALESCE(%(rejection_threshold_pct)s,5) THEN 'HIGH_REJECTION_RATE'
    ELSE 'CHECK'
  END AS "Exception Type:Data:170"
FROM `tabCentyPack Batch Control` bc
WHERE (
    ABS(COALESCE(bc.variance_kg,0)) > COALESCE(bc.allowable_variance_kg,20)
    OR COALESCE(bc.available_kg,0) <= 0
    OR (COALESCE(bc.rejected_kg,0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(bc.packhouse_weight_kg,0),0)) * 100 >= COALESCE(%(rejection_threshold_pct)s,5)
  )
  AND (%(batch_no)s IS NULL OR %(batch_no)s = '' OR bc.batch_no = %(batch_no)s)
  AND (%(customer)s IS NULL OR %(customer)s = '' OR bc.customer = %(customer)s)
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN ABS(COALESCE(bc.variance_kg,0)) > COALESCE(bc.allowable_variance_kg,20) THEN 1
    WHEN COALESCE(bc.available_kg,0) <= 0 THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END,
  ABS(COALESCE(bc.variance_kg,0)) DESC,
  COALESCE(bc.rejected_kg,0) DESC
